title: Simple Steam Deck Modpack | WORKS ON STEAM MACHINE!
description: Minecraft for Steam Machine and Steam Deck | Barebones Steam Deck Minecraft mod pack. Has been tested with Steam Deck: OLED and Steam Deck: LED!!!
body:
SIMPLY STEAM DECK/MACHINE* MODPACK | WORKS ON 1.21.6

This is Simply [**Steam Deck**](https://store.steampowered.com/steamdeck) Modpack. **Simply Steam Deck Modpack works wonderfully with Valve Steam Deck**, Simply Steam Deck is a unique Minecraft modpack designed for the **Valve Steam Deck**. (Probably works on Steam Machine also) Simply Steam Deck modpack is made for a barebones Steam Deck Minecraft experience. This modpack successfully improves the controller Minecraft experience without changing the whole game. With this modpack, the game has been modified, such as the GUI, to make the controller Minecraft experience better. This modpack has been tested on the **Valve Steam Deck OLED and LCD**. For feedback you can email both [EnvixityBO2](mailto:envixity@reeguy.com) and [ReeGuy](mailto:reeguy@reeguy.com) at contact@reeguy.com

Mod-list!

Mod Menu ![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9eGKb6K1/icon.png) - Simple Voice Chat ![CurseForge NOT Soon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/809d364367b9e32526d86d8bc1150f6e1e816e7d.png) Don't use this on servers such as Hypixel without using **Keyboard Like Movement** in controlify's global settings, this happens because Controllify "by default" opts into different movement system "which is better/more fluid on Controllers" which can trigger some anticheats unless you want to get banned. *I wish we renamed it to Deck Craft but that was taken D:
